'''dozalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinetable|cabinetable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinetable|cabinetable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dozalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozalithi|dozalithi]] || [[word:dozaliji|dozaliji]] || [[word:dozalishi|dozalishi]] || [[word:dozaliki|dozaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozaluthuthu|dozaluthuthu]] || [[word:dozalujuju|dozalujuju]] || [[word:dozalushushu|dozalushushu]] || [[word:dozalukuku|dozalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozaluthu|dozaluthu]] || [[word:dozaluju|dozaluju]] || [[word:dozalushu|dozalushu]] || [[word:dozaluku|dozaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozalufthuf|dozalufthuf]] || [[word:dozalufjuf|dozalufjuf]] || [[word:dozalufshuf|dozalufshuf]] || [[word:dozalufkuf|dozalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozalethe|dozalethe]] || [[word:dozaleje|dozaleje]] || [[word:dozaleshe|dozaleshe]] || [[word:dozaleke|dozaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozalothotho|dozalothotho]] || [[word:dozalojojo|dozalojojo]] || [[word:dozaloshosho|dozaloshosho]] || [[word:dozalokoko|dozalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozalotho|dozalotho]] || [[word:dozalojo|dozalojo]] || [[word:dozalosho|dozalosho]] || [[word:dozaloko|dozaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozalofthof|dozalofthof]] || [[word:dozalofjof|dozalofjof]] || [[word:dozalofshof|dozalofshof]] || [[word:dozalofkof|dozalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfthĂŻf|dozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfjĂŻf|dozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfshĂŻf|dozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfkĂŻf|dozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dozalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dozalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dozalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dozalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfthĂŻf|dozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfjĂŻf|dozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfshĂŻf|dozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfkĂŻf|dozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfthĂŻf|dozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfjĂŻf|dozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfshĂŻf|dozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dozalĂŻfkĂŻf|dozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozalĂŠthĂŠ|dozalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dozalĂŠjĂŠ|dozalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dozalĂŠshĂŠ|dozalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dozalĂŠkĂŠ|dozalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozalathatha|dozalathatha]] || [[word:dozalajaja|dozalajaja]] || [[word:dozalashasha|dozalashasha]] || [[word:dozalakaka|dozalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozalatha|dozalatha]] || [[word:dozalaja|dozalaja]] || [[word:dozalasha|dozalasha]] || [[word:dozalaka|dozalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozalafthaf|dozalafthaf]] || [[word:dozalafjaf|dozalafjaf]] || [[word:dozalafshaf|dozalafshaf]] || [[word:dozalafkaf|dozalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dozalasha|dozalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozalshĂ«sha|dozalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozalrosha|dozalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozalmusha|dozalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozalyasha|dozalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozalnkshĂ«sha|godozalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozalnkrosha|godozalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozalnkmusha|godozalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozalnkyasha|godozalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dozazalasha|dozazalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozazalshĂ«sha|dozazalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozazalrosha|dozazalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozazalmusha|dozazalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozazalyasha|dozazalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozazalnkshĂ«sha|godozazalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozazalnkrosha|godozazalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozazalnkmusha|godozazalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozazalnkyasha|godozazalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dezĂŠlasha|dezĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dezĂŠlshĂ«sha|dezĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dezĂŠlrosha|dezĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dezĂŠlmusha|dezĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dezĂŠlyasha|dezĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godezĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|godezĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godezĂŠlnkrosha|godezĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godezĂŠlnkmusha|godezĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godezĂŠlnkyasha|godezĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dozfalasha|dozfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozfalshĂ«sha|dozfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozfalrosha|dozfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozfalmusha|dozfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozfalyasha|dozfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozfalnkshĂ«sha|godozfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozfalnkrosha|godozfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozfalnkmusha|godozfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozfalnkyasha|godozfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
